# Seven Star Chauffeurs

> Vancouver's most discreet private luxury chauffeur service. A curated fleet of Rolls-Royce Phantom, Ghost Series II, Cullinan Black Badge, Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600, Cadillac Escalade IQ, and a private luxury party bus. Each vehicle reserved exclusively for one engagement at a time, with NDA-trained chauffeurs. Based in Vancouver, British Columbia; available across Metro Vancouver, Whistler, Sea-to-Sky corridor, and by arrangement throughout Western Canada.

## Primary services

- [Airport Transfers at YVR](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#services): Flight-monitored meet-and-greet at Vancouver International, kerbside luggage service, Phantom or Maybach staged at arrivals.
- [Corporate Chauffeur](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#services): Single-driver continuity for executive engagements across Burrard, Howe, Coal Harbour, and inter-province. NDA-ready. Typically the Rolls-Royce Ghost Series II.
- [Wedding Chauffeur](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#services): Cullinan Black Badge with custom livery, red-carpet arrival, photographer liaison, multi-location choreography from first look to final departure.
- [Whistler & Sea-to-Sky](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#services): Fully-electric Cadillac Escalade IQ between Vancouver and Whistler. Scenic stopovers at Shannon Falls and Tantalus Lookout arranged on request.
- [Nightlife & Events](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#services): Private touring coach for galas, premieres, bachelor parties. Lounge seating for up to fourteen, onboard bar, host chauffeur.
- [Hourly Charter](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#services): Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600 on retainer. Two-hour minimum, champagne service, dynamic itinerary revisable en route.

## The fleet

- Rolls-Royce Phantom (flagship; benchmark for chauffeured luxury)
- Rolls-Royce Ghost Series II (driver-focused executive)
- Rolls-Royce Cullinan Black Badge (assertive SUV)
- Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600 (first-class for up to six, reclining rear thrones)
- Cadillac Escalade IQ (fully-electric, among the first in Western Canada)
- Private Luxury Party Bus (touring coach, up to fourteen guests)

## Frequently asked

- How do I book? Reservations are accepted by private enquiry through the form at [https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#reserve](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#reserve). A concierge responds within hours with availability and confirmation.
- How are the vehicles assigned? Each vehicle is reserved for a single engagement at a time. There is no shared service.
- Are chauffeurs vetted? All chauffeurs are background-checked, trained in discretion, and NDA-ready on request.
- What is the cancellation policy? Reservations may be adjusted or cancelled up to 48 hours before the engagement without fee.
- Where do you serve? Metro Vancouver primarily. Whistler and Sea-to-Sky by standing route. Other destinations by arrangement.

## Contact

- Correspondence: reservations@sevenstarchauffeurs.ca
- Telephone: +1 (604) 000 0000
- Studio: Vancouver, British Columbia
- Availability: By appointment, 24 hours

## Positioning

Seven Star Chauffeurs operates as an invitation-only service. Pricing is quoted per engagement, not published. The brand voice is editorial, reserved, and discreet. The full site content is at [https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com).

- [llms-full.txt](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/llms-full.txt): Full page content for deeper grounding.
